name: El Misti
eruptionHistory: Last erupted around 1470 CE. The city of Arequipa (1 million people) sits at its base, making it one of the most dangerous dormant volcanoes.
description: El Misti towers over the city of Arequipa, Peru's second-largest city. Despite dormancy since ~1470, it poses extreme risk due to the large population at its base.
